name: fortune-consultant
description: Fortune Consultant - Chinese traditional calendar and metaphysics tools: BaZi charting, ZiWei Dou Shu, Plum Blossom Yi, Tarot, lunar calendar, and almanac lookup.

displayDescription.en: Traditional Chinese metaphysics reference — BaZi/ZiWei charting, Tarot and Plum Blossom hexagrams, lunar calendar and almanac. Multi-system cross-reference for self-exploration. For entertainment purposes only.
displayDescription.zh: 传统命理参考工具——八字紫微排盘、塔罗梅花起卦、农历黄历查询，多体系交叉参考，仅供娱乐。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 1987年10月16日，下午2点，女。帮我梳理一下近期的八字命盘信息。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Born 1987-10-16 at 2pm, female. Help me explore my BaZi chart and what it reflects about recent patterns.

quickPrompts.en: Born 1987-10-16 at 2pm, female. Help me explore my BaZi chart and what it reflects about recent patterns.
quickPrompts.zh: 1987年10月16日，下午2点，女。帮我梳理一下近期的八字命盘信息。

quickPrompts.en: My home faces south, moved in 2020. Use Flying Stars Feng Shui to check my study room.
quickPrompts.zh: 我家坐北朝南，2020 年入住，飞星看一下我家书房。

quickPrompts.en: Cast a Liu Yao hexagram for me: should I take the Tencent offer?
quickPrompts.zh: 用六爻起一卦：要不要接腾讯的 offer？

quickPrompts.en: Help me explore my BaZi chart and what it reflects about recent patterns.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我梳理一下近期的八字命盘信息。

quickPrompts.en: Chart my BaZi from 1990-05-15 14:30 and walk me through the decade structure.
quickPrompts.zh: 1990-05-15 14:30 排个八字，梳理一下大运结构。

quickPrompts.en: I have a question on my mind — draw me a three-card Tarot spread for reflection.
quickPrompts.zh: 心里有件事想理清思路，帮我抽三张塔罗做个参考。
